title: [profcheck][InstCombine] Fix missing profile data identified by not.ll test
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/not.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/not.ll
index 1acf55a50208d..a459dc1ef8b7f 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/not.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/not.ll
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --check-globals
 ; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
 
 declare void @use1(i1)
@@ -481,58 +481,58 @@ define i1 @not_select_bool(i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 %z) {
   ret i1 %r
 }
 
-define i1 @not_select_bool_const1(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
+define i1 @not_select_bool_const1(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_select_bool_const1(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Y_NOT:%.*]] = xor i1 [[Y:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 [[Y_NOT]], i1 false
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 [[Y_NOT]], i1 false, !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
 ;
-  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true
+  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 true, !prof !1
   %r = xor i1 %sel, true
   ret i1 %r
 }
 
-define i1 @not_select_bool_const2(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
+define i1 @not_select_bool_const2(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_select_bool_const2(
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 [[Y:%.*]], i1 false
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 [[Y:%.*]], i1 false, !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i1 [[SEL]], true
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
 ;
-  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 false
+  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 %y, i1 false, !prof !1
   %r = xor i1 %sel, true
   ret i1 %r
 }
 
-define i1 @not_select_bool_const3(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
+define i1 @not_select_bool_const3(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_select_bool_const3(
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 true, i1 [[Y:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i1 [[SEL]], true
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
 ;
-  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 true, i1 %y
+  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !1
   %r = xor i1 %sel, true
   ret i1 %r
 }
 
-define i1 @not_select_bool_const4(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
+define i1 @not_select_bool_const4(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_select_bool_const4(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Y_NOT:%.*]] = xor i1 [[Y:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 true, i1 [[Y_NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i1 true, i1 [[Y_NOT]], !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
 ;
-  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 false, i1 %y
+  %sel = select i1 %x, i1 false, i1 %y, !prof !1
   %r = xor i1 %sel, true
   ret i1 %r
 }
 
-define <2 x i1> @not_logicalAnd_not_op0(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
+define <2 x i1> @not_logicalAnd_not_op0(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) !prof !0{
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_logicalAnd_not_op0(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Y_NOT:%.*]] = xor <2 x i1> [[Y:%.*]], splat (i1 true)
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTAND:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i1> splat (i1 true), <2 x i1> [[Y_NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTAND:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i1> splat (i1 true), <2 x i1> [[Y_NOT]], !prof [[PROF2:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[NOTAND]]
 ;
   %notx = xor <2 x i1> %x, <i1 true, i1 true>
-  %and = select <2 x i1> %notx, <2 x i1> %y, <2 x i1> zeroinitializer
+  %and = select <2 x i1> %notx, <2 x i1> %y, <2 x i1> zeroinitializer, !prof !1
   %notand = xor <2 x i1> %and, <i1 true, i1 true>
   ret <2 x i1> %notand
 }
@@ -581,14 +581,14 @@ define i1 @not_logicalAnd_not_op0_use2(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
   ret i1 %notand
 }
 
-define <2 x i1> @not_logicalOr_not_op0(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
+define <2 x i1> @not_logicalOr_not_op0(<2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @not_logicalOr_not_op0(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Y_NOT:%.*]] = xor <2 x i1> [[Y:%.*]], splat (i1 true)
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTOR:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i1> [[Y_NOT]], <2 x i1> zeroinitializer
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTOR:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i1> [[Y_NOT]], <2 x i1> zeroinitializer, !prof [[PROF2]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[NOTOR]]
 ;
   %notx = xor <2 x i1> %x, <i1 true, i1 true>
-  %or = select <2 x i1> %notx, <2 x i1> <i1 true, i1 true>, <2 x i1> %y
+  %or = select <2 x i1> %notx, <2 x i1> <i1 true, i1 true>, <2 x i1> %y, !prof !1
   %notor = xor <2 x i1> %or, <i1 true, i1 true>
   ret <2 x i1> %notor
 }
@@ -754,11 +754,11 @@ entry:
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
 
-define i1 @invert_both_cmp_operands_complex(i1 %x, i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c) {
+define i1 @invert_both_cmp_operands_complex(i1 %x, i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @invert_both_cmp_operands_complex(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sub i32 [[A:%.*]], [[C:%.*]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i32 [[TMP0]], i32 [[B:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i32 [[TMP0]], i32 [[B:%.*]], !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp sge i32 [[TMP1]], [[C]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP]]
 ;
@@ -767,7 +767,7 @@ entry:
   %not.b = xor i32 %b, -1
   %not.c = xor i32 %c, -1
   %add = add i32 %c, %not.a
-  %select = select i1 %x, i32 %add, i32 %not.b
+  %select = select i1 %x, i32 %add, i32 %not.b, !prof !1
   %cmp = icmp sle i32 %select, %not.c
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
@@ -937,18 +937,18 @@ define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_or3(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
   ret i1 %not
 }
 
-define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_logical_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
+define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_logical_or(i64 %x, i64 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @test_invert_demorgan_logical_or(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[X:%.*]], 27
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[Y:%.*]], 0
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL_NOT1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 [[CMP2]], i1 false
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL_NOT1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 [[CMP2]], i1 false, !prof [[PROF2]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP3:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[X]], 0
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR_NOT:%.*]] = and i1 [[CMP3]], [[SEL_NOT1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[OR_NOT]]
 ;
   %cmp1 = icmp eq i64 %x, 27
   %cmp2 = icmp eq i64 %y, 0
-  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i1 true, i1 %cmp2
+  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i1 true, i1 %cmp2, !prof !1
   %cmp3 = icmp eq i64 %x, 0
   %or = or i1 %cmp3, %sel
   %not = xor i1 %or, true
@@ -1011,18 +1011,18 @@ define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_and3(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
 
-define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_logical_and(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
+define i1 @test_invert_demorgan_logical_and(i64 %x, i64 %y) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @test_invert_demorgan_logical_and(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[X:%.*]], 27
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[Y:%.*]], 0
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL_NOT1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP2]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL_NOT1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP2]], !prof [[PROF2]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP3:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[X]], 0
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR_NOT:%.*]] = and i1 [[CMP3]], [[SEL_NOT1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[OR_NOT]]
 ;
   %cmp1 = icmp eq i64 %x, 27
   %cmp2 = icmp eq i64 %y, 0
-  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i1 %cmp2, i1 false
+  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i1 %cmp2, i1 false, !prof !1
   %cmp3 = icmp eq i64 %x, 0
   %or = or i1 %cmp3, %sel
   %not = xor i1 %or, true
@@ -1139,3 +1139,13 @@ define i8 @invert_bitcasted_fcmp_fast(<8 x float> %a, <8 x float> %b) {
   %not = xor i8 %mask.as.int, 255
   ret i8 %not
 }
+
+!0 = !{!"function_entry_count", i64 1000}
+!1 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 2, i32 3}
+;.
+; CHECK: attributes #[[ATTR0:[0-9]+]] = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: readwrite) }
+;.
+; CHECK: [[META0:![0-9]+]] = !{!"function_entry_count", i64 1000}
+; CHECK: [[PROF1]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 2, i32 3}
+; CHECK: [[PROF2]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 3, i32 2}
+;.
